subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants of the Sacred Threshold of the Blessed Beauty! Your letter was received and through the grace and bounty of the Beloved of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده آستان جمال مبارک مکتوب مرقوم ملحوظ افتاد از فضل و موهبت دلبر آفاق
subcodes.subjects: @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity
